items.title: Court of Session Act 1839 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to regulate the Duties to be performed by the Judges in the Supreme Courts of Scotland, and to increase the Salaries of certain of the said Judges.

items.title: Highway (Railway Crossings) Act 1839
items.description: An Act to amend an Act of the Fifth and Sixth Years of the Reign of His late Majesty King William the Fourth relating to Highways.

items.title: Metropolitan Police Act 1839
items.description: An Act for further improving the Police in and near the Metropolis.

items.title: Tithe Act 1839
items.description: An Act to explain and amend the Acts for the Commutation of Tithes in England and Wales.

items.title: Metropolitan Police Courts Act 1839
items.description: An Act for regulating the Police Courts in the Metropolis.
